description: Style NoteCrafted from the brand's best materials, this bag from quiksilver is a sure fire way of charming yourself into the fashion crowd. With bold prints and sharp silhouetting, this bag grabs attention (in the right way) and hits the style notes just right. Help yourself to this delicious indulgence, we assure you won't regret it!Product DetailsBlue, grey and black printed upper with one main zipped compartmentA padded laptop holder with a velcro closure inside the main compartmentHas a pouch on top, two zipped side pockets and a zipped pocket in the front (with a key holder and organizer slots)Has a haul loop and two adjustable, padded shoulder straps (shoulder straps joined to each other with a synthetic click lock strap)The print may vary slightly from product to product Material and Care100% polyesterWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSize Height: 44 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 14 cm
